Whispaste
Features How It Works Pricing
Open Source · Windows 10/11

Voice to text,
pasted anywhere.

A lightweight desktop tool that transcribes your speech with OpenAI Whisper and pastes the result into any focused input field.

Download for Windows View on GitHub

Single portable .exe · No installer · ~8 MB · MIT License

Everything you need

Powerful features in a lightweight package. No bloat, no subscriptions — just your API key and you're ready.

Global Hotkey

Press Ctrl+Shift+V from anywhere. Fully configurable.

Push-to-Talk & Toggle

Hold the hotkey or press to start/stop — your choice.

Auto-Paste

Transcribed text appears at your cursor automatically.

Smart Mode

AI post-processing: cleanup, email, bullets, translate.

Premium Overlay

Anti-aliased waveform, timer, and controls — always on top.

History

Browse and re-copy your last transcriptions from the tray.

Audio Feedback

Subtle sounds for start, stop, success, and error states.

Autostart

Launch on Windows login, starts silently in the tray.

Auto-Update

SHA256-verified self-updater via GitHub Releases.

How it works

Four steps. Zero friction.

Step 1

Press Hotkey

Hit Ctrl+Shift+V from any app

Step 2

Speak

The overlay shows your recording

Step 3

Transcribe

Whisper converts speech to text

Step 4

Paste

Text appears at your cursor

Incredibly affordable

Whispaste uses the OpenAI Whisper API at ~$0.006/min. Most users spend just a few dollars per month.

Per-use cost

Short sentence (10–15s) ~$0.001
Half a minute ~$0.003
One full minute ~$0.006

Monthly estimates

Occasional ~5 min/day
~$1
Regular ~20 min/day
~$4
Heavy ~30 min/day
~$6
Power user ~2 hrs/day
~$22

Bring your own API key — no subscription, no middleman.

Privacy first

Your data stays yours. Always.

API key stays local

Stored only in your user profile directory, never transmitted.

Audio never saved

Recorded audio is sent directly to OpenAI and discarded.

Secure updates

SHA256 checksums verified before applying. HTTPS only.

No telemetry

Zero analytics, tracking, or phone-home. Fully open source.

Support the project

Whispaste is free and open source. If you find it useful, consider supporting development.

Sponsor on GitHub Buy a Coffee
